name: ai-typing-indicator
title: AI Typing Indicator
description: Transient three-dot indicator for an assistant turn that has begun but has no visible text yet.

props.name: label
props.description: Announced to assistive tech in place of the dots.

clinicalNotes: This signals conversational turn state only. It is not evidence that anything was retrieved, checked, or completed — never leave it on screen as the sole indication that a clinical task is progressing, and never let it stand in for a result. Under reduced-motion the dots stop bouncing but remain visible, and the whole indicator carries one accessible label rather than three animating dots, so a screen-reader user hears "Assistant is responding" once.
notes: Use ai-thinking when the product can name the phase; use this only for the gap before the first token.
